home.subtitle: I help brands turn ideas into clear visuals — from branding to motion graphics.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer – 4camping
jobs.description: Creating banners and visuals for advertising campaigns (performance and brand). Designing seasonal campaign concepts (Tent Exhibition). Creating presentations and moodboards. Designing mockups and internal visuals.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer – Imper (Saleskit)
jobs.description: Advertising print materials, merchandise and online banners, animated charts for the web, and presentation design.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor – JVS GROUP
jobs.description: Design of visual content for events and cultural events. Creating advertising spots for TV and online platforms. Developing branding materials, from logo to visual identity. Complete prepress preparation for large-format and standard print materials. Visual content for social media and online advertising (HTML5 / PPC banners). Motion graphics. Photography, interview filming, and video editing for digital content. Website edits in Wix.

jobs.title: DTP Operator – GZ Media
jobs.description: Prepared data for printing. Performed color correction on prints. Collaborated on the production of promotional materials. Operated printing machines.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer – BeefBrothers, s.r.o.
jobs.description: Internship – creating a logo for a construction company, retouching photos, designing banners for the company SYNLAB.

jobs.title: Print & Packaging – ART D
jobs.description: Internship – full handling of client orders, from design to printing and final touches.

school.name: Secondary School of Multimedia and Promotional Arts (EDUSO)
